textByHash.1308c8d3e850fbc8c17fc2f78fda537e9111dae8: No can do. We've got them all set up nicely. Can't be letting anyone mess things up, can we?
textByHash.29c3db4e5de9259e4e683d28bc3d7019589022b9: I do hope so. This war is starting to take a toll on all of us. We had to start rationing the oranges!
textByHash.4b98b19757fd589f2df559b828b87ce0da6aa6a0: Hey, don't be going near those lily pads. We've got them all set up ready for the hop-off.
textByHash.687b551c0f04050bc44c6b41ac8703b57c43769e: Sue will be a great leader though. I can't wait to see what she does first!
textByHash.9af581ef368064f16c59a7d788c66cadbec0b3ac: They grow on trees around here, like this one right next to us. From time to time an orange will fall off, but the really good ones are the ones at the top.
textByHash.ddd3d965ece247954841c47584788149f815601d: It sure is. Now that we have peace, life is at an all time high!
textByHash.ee85f1a324f815d5e6f8803cfe5a71d81ced83fa: Oh I'd kill for a nice tasty orange!
